project.source_strategy: Use sources to test retrieval as scholarly warrant rather than as fluent search. The proof must show corpus boundary, retrieved passage, evidence score, negative-space finding, abstention case, and claim boundary.
project.distinctiveness_component_to_build: Scholarly retrieval warrant and abstention trace
project.distinctiveness_component_operation: Run a question through a bounded local corpus slice; show retrieved passages, evidence score, negative-space finding, abstention case, and final claim boundary.
project.distinctiveness_component_output: A retrieval trace that distinguishes fluent context from warranted source support.
project.acceptance_test: A reviewer can see why this project could not be swapped with another page without losing the mechanism.
project.best_improvement: Show Magnum Opus as a local scholarly warrant system, not merely a query interface.
project.build_status: specified proof plan; needs live or replayable demonstrator
